uplink.description: Radar Distance/Level Sensor - battery, temperature, distance, tilt position, radar RSSI (motion detected)
uplink._note: Expected authored via the oracle method from reference/upstream-codec.js: 0x0175 battery=100%; 0x0367 temp=s16le(16,1)=0x0110=272 /10=27.2 C; 0x0482 distance=s16le(44,1)=0x012c=300 mm; 0x0500 position byte 1 => tilt => motion.detected true; 0x06c7 radar rssi=s16le(32,3)=0x0320=800 /100=8.

uplink.description: Normal position (no tilt) with battery, temperature, distance (motion NOT detected)
uplink._note: Synthetic: 0x0175 battery=88%; 0x0367 temp=s16le(200,0)=200 /10=20.0 C; 0x0482 distance=s16le(244,1)=0x01f4=500 mm; 0x0500 position byte 0 => normal => motion.detected false. Covers action.motion=false.

uplink.description: Unrecognized channel (IPSO version frame, not a measurement) yields an error
uplink._note: Synthetic: channel 0xff/0x01 (protocol version) is not a normalized measurement channel; loop breaks with nothing recognized, returning the error.
